task_completion.description: Agent logs into the system using the provided PIN and accesses the Back Office.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office dashboard or main configuration screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Order Types configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or menu of Order Types (e.g., DINE IN, TAKE OUT) is visible in the Back Office settings.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the configuration/edit window for the 'DINE IN' order type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit dialog or settings page specifically for the 'DINE IN' order type is open.

task_completion.description: Agent disables the mandatory guest count prompt for DINE IN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Show Guest Selection' (or similarly named) checkbox is visibly unchecked in the DINE IN order type settings before saving.

task_completion.description: Agent starts a new DINE IN order to verify the guest count prompt is bypassed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks to start a new 'DINE IN' order and the screen proceeds directly to the table selection or menu/order screen, without showing a popup asking for the number of guests.

integrity.description: Agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions occur within the Floreant POS application windows, not via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use SQL or database management tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running SQL commands, Derby CLI, or database GUI tools (like DBeaver) modifying the ORDER_TYPE table are visible.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Floreant POS Java application interface is visible, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Order Type: 'DINE IN'. Target Setting: 'Show Guest Selection' (corresponds to database column SHOW_GUEST_SELECTION). Expected State: Unchecked / Disabled (0/false). Admin PIN: 1111. Software: Floreant POS. The agent must use the UI to uncheck 'Show Guest Selection' in the DINE IN order type settings and verify it by starting a new DINE IN order.
